228 G0110E2_LOCOMTN_ON_SPRT_CD G0110E2_LOCOMTN_ON_SPRT_CD G0110E2 ADL Assistance: Locomotion On Support Provided Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the amount of support that the resident requires locomotion on the unit. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No setup or physical help from staff
 1=Setup help only
 2=One person physical assist
 3=Two+ persons physical assist
 8=ADL activity itself did not
